prompt: Make a Stream Deck button that's a Pomodoro timer. One button on my Stream Deck Plus shows the countdown (25:00, 24:59, etc). Click it to start or pause. When time runs out the button turns red and shows DONE. Click again to reset. No external APIs needed, just Node.js timers.
assertions: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
setInterval or setTimeout used for per-second countdown
MM:SS format countdown is rendered onto the button
Button color changes based on timer state (at least two distinct colors for running/done)
Reset logic is present (either on DONE click or separate mechanism)
No external fetch/HTTP calls — pure local logic
